title: Credit Wobbles Could Prove Perilous for Trump
description: At a meeting of the Financial Stability Oversight Council this month, Trump administration officials moved ahead with plans to scale back scrutiny of hedge funds, encouraged financial firms to experiment with artificial intelligence and lamented the burden of onerous regulation.
content:
The proposal is the product of Trump’s executive order last year that called for the inclusion of “alternative assets” in 401(k) plans, potentially boosting the returns for ordinary investors.

title: What to Know About California’s Executive Order on A.I.
description: Gov. Gavin Newsom, a Democrat, issued an order requiring safety and privacy guardrails for artificial intelligence companies contracting with the state.
content:
Gov. Gavin Newsom of California on Monday issued a first-of-its-kind executive order requiring safety and privacy guardrails from artificial intelligence companies that contract with the state.

title: Palo Alto Networks rebounds after CEO buys shares
description: Shares in the cybersecurity specialist climbed after its top executive signaled confidence in the company. The rally comes amid heightened tensions surrounding the rise of artificial intelligence.
content: Palo Alto Networks stock gained approximately 5% following the announcement that CEO Nikesh Arora purchased 68,085 shares, an investment totaling nearly $10m. This marks his first personal investment in the group since 2019. The move was interpreted ... [845 chars]

title: Meta’s $280 Billion Tailspin Sparks ‘Tobacco Moment’ Questions
description: (Bloomberg) -- Meta Platforms Inc. was looking like the best Big Tech stock in the market when the year began. But investors’ fears of legal risks and heavy spending on artificial intelligence are bubbling to the surface, culminating in last week’s 11% rout.
content:
Wall Street is now grappling with the possibility that social media companies could face a similar risk to the shrinking of the tobacco industry following stronger smoking regulations, though many say it is too early to tell.
“I don’t necessarily see... [3927 chars]

title: States Plow Ahead With A.I. Regulation, Defying Trump
description: The battle over who should regulate artificial intelligence is turning into an epic clash between President Trump and states like California and Utah.

title: Quinnipiac Poll: 80% Concerned About AI
description: A new national poll shows growing skepticism about the impact of artificial intelligence.
content:
